label: Speculative, parallel & assisted decoding

node.label: Speculative, parallel & assisted decoding
node.definition: Speculative and assisted decoding propose multiple future tokens with a cheaper process and verify them in parallel with the target model.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Speculative, parallel & assisted decoding is modeled as depending on Model servers & inference runtimes, Autoregressive decoding and feeding downstream nodes such as Large language models, Conversational assistants & chatbots.
examples: atlas downstream link to Large language models
atlas downstream link to Conversational assistants & chatbots
limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Model servers & inference runtimes, Autoregressive decoding.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Speculative, parallel & assisted decoding has an `operationalizes` dependency on Model servers & inference runtimes because Model servers & inference runtimes is modeled as infrastructure needed to operationalize the node.

In this atlas graph, Speculative, parallel & assisted decoding has an `operationalizes` dependency on Autoregressive decoding because Autoregressive decoding is modeled as infrastructure needed to operationalize the node.

In this atlas graph, Speculative, parallel & assisted decoding has an `operationalizes` dependency on Decoder-only causal transformers because Decoder-only causal transformers is modeled as infrastructure needed to operationalize the node.
